violations.text: A container of Baby Formula was observed on the shelf in the sales floor held beyond the date of expiration. Baby formula was removed form shelf for credit/disposal at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

A soap and paper towel dispenser were observed above the mop sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
The receptacles in the unisex restrooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024

The dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of plants/shrubs growth. Refuse enclosures must be kept free of clutter and debris to help prevent pest harborage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
Several ceiling tiles in the retail area were in poor repair (observed with water damage). The physical facilities must be kept in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

Several Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods were observed held at 42 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit in the 3 Door Reach-In Cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was slightly adjusted to colder setting at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
